title: A Professor's Scientific Study on Household Rewards
article_text: A professor at the university decided to construct a scientific study about household rewards. Meanwhile, he also wanted to acknowledge the academic work of his voters. He advised his team to look everywhere for data on how people use medicine at home. Furthermore, he made a remark about the absence of proper research in this field. Some people used to accuse scientists of ignoring real-world problems, but this study was different. If I were a voter, I would support such academic efforts with a reward. The professor was wearing a hat while he explained the study's goals. He said that the study was designed to impose a new way of thinking about household chores. Besides, he wanted to teach criminals in prison how to construct a better life after their release. The study's results were reported everywhere, and people began to acknowledge the importance of scientific research on everyday life.
